series.title: Love in Tokyo Tower
series.description: A chance encounter at Tokyo Tower changes everything for two strangers from different worlds. When fate keeps bringing them together, they must choose between duty and love.

series.title: Dragon's Last Heir
series.description: The last descendant of an ancient dragon bloodline discovers her powers on her 18th birthday. Now she must navigate a world of magic and betrayal.

series.title: Shadow Academy
series.description: An elite school hides deadly secrets. When a transfer student uncovers the truth, she becomes the target of forces beyond her imagination.

series.title: My CEO Boyfriend
series.description: A contract marriage between a struggling artist and a cold CEO turns into something neither expected. But his family has other plans.

series.title: Reborn as a Villain
series.description: After dying, she wakes up as the villainess in her favorite novel. Can she change her fate and rewrite the story?

series.title: Campus Rivals
series.description: Two top students compete for everything - grades, popularity, and now the same person's heart. The ultimate campus comedy.

series.title: Vampire's Contract
series.description: She signed a contract to save her brother. Now she belongs to the most powerful vampire lord for 100 nights.

series.title: Second Chance Love
series.description: Ten years after a painful breakup, they meet again. But this time, they're on opposite sides of a corporate war.

series.title: The Hidden Prince
series.description: A palace maid discovers she's been serving the true heir to the throne, hidden in plain sight. Ancient conspiracies unfold.

series.title: Infinite Inning
series.description: A baseball prodigy relives the same championship game over and over until he can figure out how to win - and why he's trapped.
